# Ananya Banerjee — ananyabanerjee.org

> Ananya Banerjee is a Senior Software Engineer at LinkedIn, iOS app developer, AI researcher, and writer based in the San Francisco Bay Area.

## Who I Am

Ananya Banerjee holds an MS in Computer Science from the University of Texas at Dallas (Master's Research Fellow, Jonsson Scholarship recipient) and a BE from BITS Pilani. She is a two-time hackathon champion and CIFAR Deep Learning Reinforcement Learning Summer School scholar (selected from 88 countries).

## What I Build

### iOS Apps
- **AgentChat Hub** — Universal messenger for A2A-compatible AI agents. Available on iOS, iPad, Mac, and Vision Pro. Free, no account required.
- **It Made My Day** — Private gratitude vault for capturing daily moments, compliments, photos, voice notes, and links.

### AI Agents & Research
- **code-review-graph** — Knowledge graph that gives AI coding agents structural context (callers, dependencies, test coverage, impact radius) for code review with far fewer tokens.
- **Knowledge-Infused Text-to-Image Generation** — Deep learning model that combines common-sense reasoning and scene graphs to generate images from text descriptions.
- **OpenLLM Bridge** — Bridges open-source LLMs to production agent workflows.

## Where I Write

- Towards Data Science (since Sep 2019)
- Towards AI (since Apr 2020)
- Analytics Vidhya (since May 2020)
- The Startup / Medium (since Oct 2019)
- LinkedIn Articles (business strategy, AI, productivity)

- 1st Place, eBay Invent Week 2024 (1,000+ teams)
- Leadership Choice Award, eBay Global Showcase 2023
- 1st Place, eBay Invent Week 2023
- CIFAR DLRL Summer School Scholar 2020 (88 countries)
- Master's Research Fellowship, UT Dallas 2020
- Jonsson Graduate Scholarship, UT Dallas 2018
